_meta.purpose: Inventory of expert agent personas — the ones we KNOW are out there. 'vendored:true' ship in-repo (license-compliant, attributed). The rest are fetched ON DEMAND (the Matrix 'load the program' model) IF their license is permissive. Cataloging metadata is not redistribution.
_meta.compliance: Auto-fetch is gated by agent_router.license_ok (MIT / Apache / BSD / ISC / Unlicense / CC0 only). Non-permissive or unlicensed (e.g. NOASSERTION) sources are cataloged but NEVER auto-fetched — verify + vendor manually. Fetched files land in agents/_fetched/ (gitignored — a per-user runtime cache, not redistributed) with a SOURCE attribution note.
_meta.llm_independent: An agent = persona (prompt text) + role. Spawning = inject that text into a chat call to whatever endpoint is configured (a prior agent / Claude subscription proxy / Claude API / local). No coupling to any LLM.
